'''Murble''' was a poor [[Human/Legends|Human]] beggar and street-corner animal trainer who wandered through the corridors and bazaars of the [[Southern Underground/Legends|Southern Underground]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He was a small [[Gender/Legends|man]] with pale skin from [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of underground living. He had dark patches under his [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and a sickly appearance. He made a meager living by performing with his trained [[Bursa/Legends|bursa]] named [[Fierce]], who was as stooped and sickly as her master, but able to perform simple tricks.<ref name="CCW" />
